texto: I had a teacher, he was 86 years old and his name was Luigi in New York City, and he said, 'Never stop moving. You get to reinvent yourself.' So you have to find ways to reinventing yourself. Especially today, because it's a whole different market - social media is so important.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ben Vereen sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I had a teacher, he was 86 years old and his name was Luigi in New York City, and he said, 'Never…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, today, social-media, útil em momentos de social-media.

texto: Sometimes we look for those thunderous things to happen in our life for our lives to change or go in the other direction. We seek the miracle. We seek the parting of the seas, the moving of the mountains. But no, it's a quiet thing. At least for me it was.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Vereen sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes we look for those thunderous things to happen in our life for our lives to change or go…” articula vida, mountains, moving em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e mountains.
